text: Pull up all unpaid invoices for GlobalTech Ltd from the last 90 days
invoices.search(customer='GlobalTech Ltd', status='unpaid', days=90)

invoice_id: INV-2026-0101
customer: GlobalTech Ltd
status: unpaid
amount: 28500.00
currency: USD
issue_date: 2026-01-20
due_date: 2026-02-20
line_items:
  1. Platform license Q1 2026 — $18,000.00
  2. Support SLA premium — $6,500.00
  3. Onboarding sessions (3x) — $4,000.00
notes: NET-30 terms, first overdue notice sent 2026-02-21

Found 4 unpaid invoices for GlobalTech Ltd totaling $84,250. The oldest is 54 days overdue. How would you like to proceed?
Check their active subscriptions too
subscriptions.list(customer='GlobalTech Ltd', status='active')

subscription_id: SUB-2025-0021
customer: GlobalTech Ltd
plan: Enterprise Platform
status: active
monthly_amount: 6000.00
next_billing: 2026-05-01
start_date: 2025-07-01
They have 1 active subscription: Enterprise Platform at $6,000/month, next billing May 1.
Draft an escalation email to their billing contact referencing all 4 invoices
email.draft(to='billing@globaltech.io', subject='Urgent: Outstanding invoices — GlobalTech Ltd', template='escalation_billing')

status: ok
draft_id: DRF-2026-0201
subject: Urgent: Outstanding invoices — GlobalTech Ltd
to: billing@globaltech.io
body_preview: Dear GlobalTech Ltd Billing Team, We are writing regarding 4 outstanding invoices...
Escalation email drafted (DRF-2026-0201). References all 4 invoices and the $84,250 total.
Send it and log a CRM activity for this escalation
email.send(draft_id='DRF-2026-0201')

status: ok
message_id: MSG-2026-1102
delivered_at: 2026-04-15T10:14:22Z
recipient: billing@globaltech.io
activities.log(customer_id='CUST-00287', type='email_escalation', note='Sent escalation email for 4 unpaid invoices totaling $84,250', linked_to='MSG-2026-1102')

status: ok
activity_id: ACT-2026-0509
logged_at: 2026-04-15T10:14:35Z
Email sent (MSG-2026-1102) and CRM activity logged (ACT-2026-0509).
Find all contacts at GlobalTech that are marked as decision makers
contacts.find(customer_id='CUST-00287', role='decision_maker')

contact_id: CON-2026-0091
name: Michael Torres
title: VP Finance
email: m.torres@globaltech.io
phone: +1-555-0287
role: decision_maker

contact_id: CON-2026-0094
name: Sarah Lin
title: CEO
email: s.lin@globaltech.io
phone: +1-555-0291
role: decision_maker
Found 2 decision makers: Michael Torres (VP Finance) and Sarah Lin (CEO).
Search the deals pipeline for any open deals with GlobalTech
deals.search(customer_id='CUST-00287', status='open')

deal_id: DEAL-2026-0044
customer: GlobalTech Ltd
status: open
stage: negotiation
value: 120000.00
close_date_target: 2026-06-30
owner: alice@company.com
1 open deal: $120K renewal in negotiation stage, targeting close by June 30.
Post a summary to Slack in the #accounts channel so the team is aware
slack.post(channel='accounts', message='GlobalTech Ltd update: 4 unpaid invoices ($84.2K), escalation email sent, renewal deal $120K in negotiation. cc @alice @mike')

status: ok
message_ts: 1744712340.112
channel: accounts
permalink: https://company.slack.com/archives/C04ACCOUNTS/p1744712340112
Posted to #accounts on Slack. The team has been notified.
Check the production deployment status — want to make sure the billing service is healthy
deployments.status(service='billing-service', environment='production')

status: ok
service: billing-service
environment: production
version: v3.2.1
deployed_at: 2026-04-14T08:00:00Z
health: healthy
instances: 4
latency_p99_ms: 82
Billing service is healthy on v3.2.1 with 4 instances and p99 latency of 82ms.
Query the application logs for any billing errors in the last hour
logs.query(service='billing-service', level='error', since='1h')

result_count: 0
query: service=billing-service level=error since=2026-04-15T13:30:00Z
scanned_lines: 48291
execution_time_ms: 310
No billing errors in the last hour across 48K log lines. Clean.
Good. Now check if there are any pending infra deployments queued
deployments.list(status='queued', environment='production')

deployments: []
count: 0
environment: production
No deployments queued for production. The pipeline is clear.
Search the docs for our payment terms policy
pages.search(query='payment terms NET-30 policy', namespace='billing')

results:
  - page_id: DOC-0142, title: Payment Terms Policy, score: 0.94, updated: 2026-03-01
  - page_id: DOC-0198, title: Invoice Escalation Runbook, score: 0.81, updated: 2026-02-15
Found 2 relevant docs: Payment Terms Policy (DOC-0142) and Invoice Escalation Runbook (DOC-0198).
Reindex the billing docs namespace to make sure search is current
documents.reindex(namespace='billing')

status: ok
documents_indexed: 47
namespace: billing
duration_ms: 892
completed_at: 2026-04-15T14:31:05Z
Billing docs namespace reindexed: 47 documents updated in 892ms.
Run an accounts receivable aging report for this month
reports.aging(period='2026-04', currency='USD')

status: ok
period: 2026-04
total_outstanding: 312450.00
buckets:
  current: 89200.00
  1-30_days: 121100.00
  31-60_days: 68500.00
  61-90_days: 33650.00
  90plus_days: 0.00
top_customers:
  - GlobalTech Ltd: 84250.00
  - NovaCorp: 41200.00
  - Stellar Systems: 38900.00
AR aging report: $312K total outstanding. GlobalTech is the largest at $84.2K. 31-60 day bucket is the biggest risk.
Assign the GlobalTech account escalation role to the collections team lead
roles.assign(user='collections-lead@company.com', role='account_escalation', scope='CUST-00287')

status: ok
assignment_id: ROLE-ASSIGN-2026-0312
user: collections-lead@company.com
role: account_escalation
scope: CUST-00287
assigned_at: 2026-04-15T14:32:00Z
Collections team lead assigned account_escalation role for GlobalTech (CUST-00287).
Search for any related web articles on GlobalTech Ltd in the news
web.search(query='GlobalTech Ltd company news 2026')

results:
  - title: GlobalTech announces $200M Series D, url: https://techcrunch.com/2026/02/10/globaltech-series-d, snippet: GlobalTech Ltd has raised $200M in a Series D round led by Horizon Ventures...
  - title: GlobalTech expands to APAC markets, url: https://businesswire.com/2026/03/15/globaltech-apac, snippet: Austin-based SaaS startup GlobalTech Ltd announced expansion into Asia Pacific...
GlobalTech raised a $200M Series D in February and is expanding to APAC. They appear financially healthy — the payment delay may be administrative rather than financial distress.
Good context. Update the deal stage to 'closing' given their funding news
deals.update(deal_id='DEAL-2026-0044', stage='closing', notes='Series D funded, APAC expansion, payment delays likely administrative')

status: ok
deal_id: DEAL-2026-0044
stage: closing
updated_at: 2026-04-15T14:33:15Z
Deal stage updated to 'closing'. Notes added about funding and context.
Send a Slack message to Alice letting her know the deal is moving to closing
slack.post(channel='alice', message='GlobalTech deal DEAL-2026-0044 moved to closing stage. Series D context added. Recommend priority follow-up call this week.')

status: ok
message_ts: 1744712600.445
channel: alice
permalink: https://company.slack.com/archives/DM_ALICE/p1744712600445
Alice notified on Slack about the deal moving to closing stage.
Create a subscription update proposal for GlobalTech — upgrade from Enterprise to Enterprise Plus
subscriptions.update(subscription_id='SUB-2025-0021', proposed_plan='Enterprise Plus', proposed_amount=9500.00, effective_date='2026-07-01')

status: ok
proposal_id: SUB-PROP-2026-0031
subscription_id: SUB-2025-0021
proposed_plan: Enterprise Plus
proposed_amount: 9500.00
effective_date: 2026-07-01
created_at: 2026-04-15T14:34:00Z
Subscription upgrade proposal created (SUB-PROP-2026-0031): Enterprise → Enterprise Plus at $9,500/month from July 1.
List all notifications sent to GlobalTech contacts in the last 7 days
notifications.list(customer_id='CUST-00287', since='7d')

notifications:
  - id: NOTIF-2026-0389, type: invoice_reminder, sent: 2026-04-08T09:00:00Z, recipient: billing@globaltech.io
  - id: NOTIF-2026-0441, type: escalation_email, sent: 2026-04-15T10:14:22Z, recipient: billing@globaltech.io
count: 2
2 notifications sent to GlobalTech in the last 7 days: invoice reminder on Apr 8 and the escalation email today.
Perfect. Create a summary activity note with everything we've done today for the GlobalTech account

activities.log(customer_id='CUST-00287', type='account_review', note='Comprehensive account review: 4 unpaid invoices ($84.2K), escalation email sent, deal moved to closing, subscription upgrade proposed, collections team lead assigned, AR aging reviewed.', duration_minutes=45)

status: ok
activity_id: ACT-2026-0510
logged_at: 2026-04-15T14:35:00Z
Account review activity logged (ACT-2026-0510). GlobalTech account fully actioned for today.
